headline: Tyler Technologies Completes Acquisition of For The Record
summary: PLANO, Texas, April 14, 2026--Tyler Technologies announced today it has completed the previously announced acquisition of For The Record.

raw.headline: Tyler Technologies Completes Acquisition of For The Record

headline: 'Big Short' Legend Steve Eisman Says Buying Software Stocks Is 'Just Like Catching A Falling Knife'
summary: Steve Eisman compares the software selloff to the 2008 financial crisis as Salesforce, ServiceNow, and Adobe trade at historic low valuations.
